import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num == 1
        sum = sum + sign * cur
        count = count + 1
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and in_num == 0
      sign = -1
      in_num = 1
    else if b == 43 and in_num == 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = 1
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num == 1
    sum = sum + sign * cur
    count = count + 1
  end
  let avg = sum / count
  println("avg=#{avg}")
end
